description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. Use the alpine:latest Docker image for the build job, which runs before_script commands: apk add --no-cache make curl; echo "Retrieving Hugo ${HUGO_VERSION} for ${HUGO_BITS}-bit Linux..."; curl -L https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/download/v${HUGO_VERSION}/hugo_${HUGO_VERSION}_Linux-${HUGO_BITS}bit.tar.gz -o hugo.tar.gz; tar -v -x -f hugo.tar.gz. The build job script runs "HUGO_BIN=./hugo make all" and stores the resulting "build" directory as an artifact. The deploy job uses the node:11 image, runs only on the master branch, and executes "npm install -g s3-cli aws-cloudfront-invalidate", then "s3-cli sync --delete-removed ./build/ s3://$S3_BUCKET_NAME/", and finally runs "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=${AWS_ACCESS_KEY} AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=${AWS_SECRET_KEY} aws-cloudfront-invalidate ${CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID}". Define variables GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive, HUGO_BITS=64, HUGO_VERSION=0.91.2, and S3_BUCKET_NAME=codeandsupply.fund.
